name: Gizmo Zippersnap
sd_appearance: A hunched goblin, barely 3 feet tall, with large bat-like ears and wide, bright eyes, is hunched over ancient texts. His skin is a patchwork of scars and stains, his wiry frame accentuated by reinforced elbows. He wears a set of pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips adorning the sleeves, and glass-lens goggles perched precariously on his pointed nose. His ink-stained hands, fingers long and dexterous, flip through the pages of a forbidden text, a dagger sheathed at his side serving as a last resort. His distinctive visual detail - a pair of lens reading glasses hovering slightly above the text, held in place by a delicate filament of glowing energy.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
